arts.ttl: Gary Neville rips into 'appalling and pathetic' Tottenham moment against Liverpool as Man Utd legend doesn't hold back
arts.sum: The Reds are romping to a the Premier League title with sorry Spurs blasted by Manchester United icon Neville

arts.ttl: Premier League issue explanation as VAR overrules offside call in Liverpool vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Liverpool fell behind early on in Sunday's huge game against Tottenham but they were able to restore parity quickly after a VAR check ruled that a Luis Diaz goal should stand

arts.ttl: Liverpool stars arrive at Anfield through clouds of red smoke as fans prepare for Premier League title party ahead of Tottenham clash
arts.sum: The Reds have run away with the league this season in the absence of any real challenge and sit 12 points ahead of second-placed Arsenal with five games to play this term.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Spurs team news: Alexander-Arnold starts
arts.sum: Kick-off at Anfield is at 16:30 BST The post Liverpool v Spurs team news: Alexander-Arnold starts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Tottenham starting lineups confirmed as Arne Slot makes two changes to Reds XI
arts.sum: Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur confirm their starting lineups for Sunday's Premier League clash, where the Reds need just a point to win the title.

arts.ttl: Liverpool need a point vs Tottenham to clinch title LIVE!
arts.sum: They only need a point against lowly Tottenham to be absolutely sure of the 2024-25 title. All aboard the Premier League title train...

arts.ttl: Liverpool LIVE updates as thousands of fans turn up for Tottenham party at Anfield
arts.sum: Liverpool will be crowned Premier League champions if they draw or win at home to Tottenham Hotspur on this afternoon and fans are getting ready for an almighty celebration

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Tottenham (27 de Abr., 2025) Resultados en Vivo

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Tottenham LIVE: Team news and line-ups with Arne Slot’s side set to secure title
arts.sum: A draw will be enough for Liverpool to win the Premier League for a second time

arts.ttl: Arne Slot lays down challenge to Liverpool stars ahead of Tottenham title party
arts.sum: Liverpool can officially be crowned Premier League champions this afternoon provided they avoid defeat against Tottenham with Arne Slot calling for his side to deliver
